social.label: Instagram
social.description: Short-form updates, stills, and behind-the-scenes moments from the film.

social.label: TikTok
social.description: Quick clips, trailer moments, and audience-facing campaign posts.

social.label: YouTube
social.description: Trailer drops, feature clips, and longer-form video updates.

social.label: Discord
social.description: A community space for fans to discuss the film, share content, and connect with the team.

social.label: Patreon
social.description: Dedicated membership page for bonus material and future member-only content.

social.label: Letterboxd
social.description: Follow on Letterboxd for reviews, ratings, and community discussions about the film.

social.label: IMDB
social.description: Follow on IMDb for official film information, ratings, and reviews.

social.label: X
social.description: Follow on X (formerly Twitter) for updates and community engagement.

social.label: Threads
social.description: Follow on Threads for discussions and updates from the film team.
